questionText: API latency is variable & app is sluggish. How do you design UI safely?

keyMoments.description: Clearly identified the root cause of latency variability.
Missed mentioning skeleton screens as a loading strategy.
Good use of optimistic UI pattern with rollback on error.
Explained retry logic and exponential backoff correctly.
Did not address offline-first caching as a fallback.
